title: Equity Norms Under Semicon 2.0 to Drive Investment for Advance Chips Design by Indian Cos: IT Secy
description: The government expects the Rs 1.27 lakh crore Semicon 2.0 programme to spur large-scale investment in advanced semiconductor design by introducing co-investment incentives for Indian chip companies. Electronics and IT Secretary S Krishnan said the scheme will combine government funding with investments from venture capital firms to support the development of high-end chips, including those used in artificial intelligence.
content: Provisions under Semicon 2.0 to provide incentives to Indian chip-making firms against equity are expected to drive largescale investment required for the development of advanced chips for technology such as artificial intelligence, a senior governme... [1563 chars]

title: Netflix now using AI to generate crowds and battle scenes
description: Artificial intelligence has been used in around 300 Netflix titles this year alone, the video streaming market leader has said.
content:
SAN JOSE: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been used in around 300 Netflix titles this year alone, the video streaming market leader has said.

title: Emdoor Launches "Ailyn" AI Hub at WAIC 2026: Unifying Intelligence Across Every Device
description: SHANGHAI, July 19, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Emdoor, a leading provider of intelligent computing devices, unveiled its latest innovation - Ailyn, an integrated software-hardware AI hub - at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) 2026. Under the theme 'Intelligence in All Things, Boundless Edge Intelligence', Emdoor's Booth X1B-804 showcases four immersive scenarios spanning personal, home, enterprise, and industrial use cases, demonstrating how AI can flow seamlessly across devices.

title: Artificial Intelligence Is Changing The Economics Of Cybercrime
description: Cybercriminals can now execute sophisticated attacks with far less time, expertise, and cost, fundamentally shifting the balance between attackers and defenders.

title: UN Chief urges inclusive AI governance, says tech shaping humanity's future must be shaped by all humanity
description: SHANGHAI, July 17: United Nations Secretary-General Ant nio Guterres has called for global cooperation to ensure artificial intelligence benefits all countries, warning that AI could either become humanity's greatest opportunity or one of its greatest risks. title: Once-in-a-lifetime planetary alignment, the Barbault Basket, in July 2026, has everyone talking about humanity's future: These 4 zodiac signs astrologers say could feel its biggest impact
description: A rare planetary alignment called the Barbault Basket will occur in July 2026. Astrologers believe this configuration signifies a major shift in human society. This event is expected to usher in a more cooperative and progressive global period. Technology and artificial intelligence will likely play a significant role in these changes. The alignment offers a symbolic turning point for collective reflection and positive transformation.
